title: Garden Route Padel opens 2026: Local players called to represent their town
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Padel players across the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Padel players across the Garden Route are invited to step onto the court and represent their town in the Garden Route Padel Opens 2026 (GRPO) — a regional competition designed to showcase local talent and crown one ultimate champion.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Padel players across the Garden Route are invited to step onto the court and represent their town in the Garden Route Padel Opens 2026 (GRPO) — a regional competition designed to showcase local talent and crown one ultimate champion."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With qualifiers hosted at padel clubs throughout the region, players will compete for a coveted place in the GRPO Finals, taking place on 14 March at Virgin Active Padel Club in George.","html":"With qualifiers hosted at padel clubs throughout the region, players will compete for a coveted place in the GRPO Finals, taking place on 14 March at Virgin Active Padel Club in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From Knysna to Mossel Bay, each town brings its own energy, rivalry and pride to the court.","html":"From Knysna to Mossel Bay, each town brings its own energy, rivalry and pride to the court."},{"type":"heading","text":"Qualifier rounds kick off in early February, with events scheduled at:","level":"h3"},{"type":"list","items":["7 February – Liv Padel Knysna supported by Deep Heat","8 February – Africa Padel Plettenberg Bay supported by Seeff","21 February – Oudtshoorn Padel Supported by Henque Waste","28 February – Garden Route Padel George supported by Regus George","7 March – Mossel Bay Padel supported by Rauch Gertenbach"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Categories are","html":"Categories are"},{"type":"list","items":["Mens Advance Double Division /R600","Mix Beginners Americano","Mix Intermediate /R250 Americano /R250"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you’re playing for pride, competition, or bragging rights, the Garden Route Padel Opens offers players the chance to compete locally — with a clear path to the finals.","html":"Whether you’re playing for pride, competition, or bragging rights, the Garden Route Padel Opens offers players the chance to compete locally — with a clear path to the finals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spots are limited and expected to fill quickly. Players are encouraged to enter early to secure their place on the draw.","html":"Spots are limited and expected to fill quickly. Players are encouraged to enter early to secure their place on the draw."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Click on this link to enter now."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your town. Your team. Your shot at the final.","html":"Your town. Your team. Your shot at the final."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Players are encouraged to enter early to secure their place on the draw.","html":"Players are encouraged to enter early to secure their place on the draw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
